sources.openf1Error:
HTTP 401 from https://api.openf1.org/v1/drivers?meeting_key=latest&team_name=Aston%20Martin
{"detail":"Live F1 session in progress. Global API access (including past sessions) is restricted to authenticated users until the session ends. Get an API key here: https://buy.stripe.com/eVqcN41BPek
sources.note: Drivers/numbers come ONLY from OpenF1. Standings come from Jolpica (Ergast-compatible) with Ergast fallback. No fallback drivers are ever inserted.

meta.note: Positions are formatted as P1, P2, etc. If OpenF1 returns <2 drivers, drivers[] will be empty (no placeholders). Number images are pulled from your repo using the OpenF1-provided number.
